headline: Tencent expands OpenClaw suite with enterprise tool amid China’s ‘lobster’ craze
excerpt:

full_text:
ClawPro tool promises quick AI agent deployment, giving enterprises control over models, tokens and security

2 -MIN READ2 -MIN

Listen

Iris Dengin Shenzhen

Published: 8:00pm, 3 Apr 2026

Tencent Holdings has launched a new OpenClaw tool for enterprises that promises easy deployment of the artificial intelligence agent as part of the Chinese internet giant’s efforts to capitalise on the “lobster” frenzy in the country.

ClawPro, launched in public beta by Tencent’s cloud unit on Thursday, works as an AI agent management platform for enterprises, allowing them to deploy OpenClaw templates, select models and agents, track token consumption and manage security settings.

Tencent said firms could deploy ClawPro in just 10 minutes, without the need for specialised technical support.

Advertisement

During its internal beta, ClawPro was adopted by more than 200 organisations, including those in finance, government and manufacturing sectors requiring strict security compliance, according to a company statement on Thursday.

ClawPro is the latest addition to Tencent’s suite of OpenClaw tools for amateurs, developers and enterprises, as the company aggressively banks on the country’s enthusiasm for the agent to win users in China’s competitive AI landscape.

Tencent previously launched WorkBuddy, an OpenClaw-compatible AI agent for workplace tasks, and QClaw, which connects to the company’s super app WeChat, among other tools.

headline: Manulife, HSBC, Barclays among big finance firms pushing AI adoption in Hong Kong
excerpt:
Manulife, HSBC Holdings and Barclays are among the big financial firms that have announced plans to boost their adoption of artificial intelligence, in line with the Hong Kong government’s efforts to promote the use of the technology.
Manulife last week said it had relocated Mark Czajkowski, chief AI officer for Asia, to Hong Kong from Singapore, and had appointed Liu Hongjuan as chief AI and data officer of Manulife Hong Kong and Macau, a newly created post, on March 9.
HSBC Holdings, the...
full_text:
Manulife, HSBC Holdings and Barclays are among the big financial firms that have announced plans to boost their adoption of artificial intelligence, in line with the Hong Kong government’s efforts to promote the use of the technology.

Manulife last week said it had relocated Mark Czajkowski, chief AI officer for Asia, to Hong Kong from Singapore, and had appointed Liu Hongjuan as chief AI and data officer of Manulife Hong Kong and Macau, a newly created post, on March 9.

HSBC Holdings, the city’s biggest lender, appointed David Rice, previously the chief operating officer for corporate and institutional banking, as its first chief AI officer from April 1.

The AI leadership appointments show that big financial players have stepped up their efforts to adopt AI. This comes after Financial Secretary Paul Chan Mo-po launched an AI+ strategy in this year’s budget to promote AI applications in the banking sector and AI literacy at all levels of society.

“As Manulife accelerates its ambition to become an AI-powered organisation, we continue to strengthen our AI leadership and investment in Hong Kong, reinforcing the city’s role as an AI innovation hub,” Liu said in an interview with the South China Morning Post.
summary_zh: 美國人壽、滙豐及巴克萊等大型金融機構宣布加大人工智能採納力度，與香港政府推動科技應用的政策步調一致。

headline: Tesla outraces China’s BYD in pure electric car sales to regain world’s top spot
excerpt:
Tesla has regained the global pure electric vehicle (EV) crown for the first time since the fourth quarter of 2024, after its deliveries rose 6.5 per cent year on year in the three months ending March.
The modest increase was enough for the US carmaker to beat China’s EV king BYD, which posted a 25.5 per cent drop in sales during the first quarter of 2026.
Tesla’s deliveries worldwide between January and March hit 358,023 units, it said in a statement on Thursday. Tesla builds only pure electric
full_text:
Tesla’s deliveries worldwide between January and March hit 358,023 units, it said in a statement on Thursday. Tesla builds only pure electric cars or battery electric vehicles (BEVs).

BYD assembles both BEVs and plug-in hybrid vehicles. The Shenzhen-based carmaker’s BEV sales in the first quarter stood at 310,389 units.

“BYD suffered a setback in the domestic market as it is the company’s major source of growth,” said Gao Shen, an independent analyst in Shanghai. “Tesla remains relatively stable, banking on a large base of customers around the world.”

Tesla and BYD have been locked in a battle for the title of the world’s largest BEV maker since mid-2023. BYD beat Tesla for the first time in pure electric car deliveries in the fourth quarter of that year.
summary_zh: 特斯拉一季度純電動車銷量重奪全球第一，擊敗中國比亞迪；特斯拉交付量年增6.5%至35.8萬輛，而比亞迪純電動車銷量則下跌25.5%。

headline: China’s Pop Mart struggles to stem slide despite buy-backs amid Labubu reliance concerns
excerpt:
Chinese toymaker Pop Mart remains under pressure despite carrying out six share buy-backs over the past few days following a sell-off after its results, raising questions over whether the weakness reflects concerns about its Labubu-led growth and valuation.
The Beijing-based company has stepped up efforts to support its share price through market purchases. Pop Mart bought back 700,000 shares on Thursday at prices ranging from HK$140.90 to HK$142.30, for a total of HK$99.2 million (US$12.6...
full_text:
The Beijing-based company has stepped up efforts to support its share price through market purchases. Pop Mart bought back 700,000 shares on Thursday at prices ranging from HK$140.90 to HK$142.30, for a total of HK$99.2 million (US$12.6 million), according to a filing with the Hong Kong stock exchange.

The latest moves extended the company’s buy-backs to six consecutive days from March 26. Over that period, Pop Mart repurchased a total of 9.32 million shares for about HK$1.4 billion, even as the stock fell 16 per cent. So far this year, the company has conducted eight rounds of buy-backs, acquiring 11.22 million shares worth about HK$1.74 billion.

The stock closed 2.4 per cent lower at HK$141.80 on Thursday, marking a nearly 48 per cent plunge since its recent peak of HK$269.80 on February 10, wiping out nearly HK$101 billion in market capitalisation.

The flurry of repurchases followed a sharp sell-off on March 25, when the company’s shares tumbled nearly 23 per cent after the release of its latest results. Pop Mart reported a 285 per cent growth in net profit and forecast no less than 20 per cent expansion this year, driven by continued investment in its flagship Labubu franchise and new product launches.

While analysts had initially said the earnings were broadly in line with expectations, sentiment shifted quickly, with several brokerages including Morgan Stanley lowering their target prices and adopting a more cautious stance on the stock.
summary_zh: 玩具公司Pop Mart儘管連日進行股份回購，但股價仍跌勢難止，引發市場對其Labubu產品依賴及估值的擔憂。

headline: Hong Kong positions itself as launchpad as ‘China Inc.’ accelerates global expansion
excerpt:

Gathering at the Island Shangri-La Hong Kong for the 2026 SCMP C-Suite Annual Leadership Summit, CEOs and business leaders from Hong Kong, China and across the region, convened to dissect the “China Inc. Goes Global” phenomenon. The closed-door forum, organised by the South China Morning Post, provided a rare
full_text:
As Chinese enterprises pivot from traditional export models to building comprehensive global ecosystems, the strategic road map for this expansion took centre stage in Hong Kong on Tuesday.

Gathering at the Island Shangri-La Hong Kong for the 2026 SCMP C-Suite Annual Leadership Summit, CEOs and business leaders from Hong Kong, China and across the region, convened to dissect the “China Inc. Goes Global” phenomenon. The closed-door forum, organised by the South China Morning Post, provided a rare venue for off-the-record discussions on navigating volatile markets and leveraging Hong Kong as a strategic springboard for cross-border ambitions.

“Going global has evolved from simple product exports to a holistic endeavour of brand building and ecosystem development,” noted Sunny Shang, President of Huawei Cloud APAC, the summit’s presenting partner. He added that such expansion is “no longer an option, but a strategic imperative for long-term growth”.

Advertisement

Capitalising on new markets

Following welcoming remarks by SCMP Chief Growth Officer Ang Jin, the agenda shifted to the mechanics of this global push through two in-depth and candid fireside chats with SCMP Publisher Tammy Tam.

Advertisement

Carlson Tong, Chairman of Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing, sat down with Tam and offered perspectives on how regional companies are positioning themselves for new fundraising opportunities and cross-border investment in 2026 and beyond. Adding to the financial outlook, Hong Kong Investment Corporation CEO Clara Chan joined Tam to detail the strategic deployment of “patient capital”. Chan highlighted the fund’s impact – having backed over 200 projects with its initial HK$62 billion capital – and outlined future growth phases following the 2026-27 Budget Speech. Both speakers engaged in a lively dialogue with Tam and took questions from the floor, providing attendees with a unique opportunity to interact directly and gain valuable insights.

Lessons from the front lines

Advertisement

A focal point of the evening was a deep dive into the practical realities of international scaling with Gui Shengyue, CEO of Geely Automobile Holdings. In an interview with SCMP Chief Development Officer Eugene Tang, Gui unpacked the lessons learned during Geely’s 20-year global journey, detailing experiences ranging from landmark acquisitions to establishing operations from the ground up.

To take the pulse of the room, the summit leveraged interactive live polling, sparking a spirited conversation among the gathered executives regarding the realities of international expansion. Asked to describe their economic outlook for 2026, many participants stressed volatility and uncertainty – but a significant majority still held a favourable view of Hong Kong remaining the top place for companies to raise funds and support their growth in 2026.

When asked what they viewed as the biggest challenge to growing abroad, most cited geopolitics, followed by people, and cultural differences – symbolising the complexity of international expansion in the current environment. Nonetheless, they strongly agreed that Hong Kong serves as an effective “super-connector” for Chinese companies expanding internationally, helping to mitigate these challenges.

Advertisement

Ultimately, the discussions underscored a collective push among business leaders to build alliances that will set the agenda for the future, cementing Hong Kong and Asia’s unique strengths in driving China’s next era of global champions.

The forum was held exclusively for the SCMP C-Suite community that connects Asian CEOs and industry game-changers, providing in-person access and unparalleled intelligence on China’s evolving economic landscape.

Advertisement
summary_zh: 香港舉辦高層領袖峰會，探討中國企業從傳統出口模式轉變為建立全球生態系統的擴張策略，定位香港為「中國公司」全球擴張的啟動平台。

headline: Leapmotor targets global growth with Europe R&D hub, eyes Canada assembly
excerpt:
Leapmotor, one of China’s strongest-performing electric vehicle (EV) makers this year, is accelerating its global push with a new innovation centre in Europe and plans for potential local assembly in Canada, as it looks to entrench production of its low-cost smart cars overseas.
The Hangzhou-based carmaker, backed by Fiat owner Stellantis, has also raised its overseas sales target by 50 per cent, betting that higher fuel costs and easing trade barriers will bolster demand for Chinese-made...
full_text:
The Hangzhou-based carmaker, backed by Fiat owner Stellantis, has also raised its overseas sales target by 50 per cent, betting that higher fuel costs and easing trade barriers will bolster demand for Chinese-made EVs.

“None of Chinese EV makers will ignore opportunities offered by overseas markets,” said Qian Kang, who runs a Zhejiang-based supplier of vehicle circuit boards. “Leapmotor’s goal of gaining a foothold in markets like Europe is a result of the rising popularity of Chinese EVs worldwide.”

Founder and CEO Zhu Jiangming said this week that deliveries outside China could exceed 150,000 units in 2026, up from a previous target of 100,000 set in December. Total sales this year are expected to surpass 1 million vehicles, a 40 per cent increase from 2025.

Last month, Leapmotor opened its first overseas research and development hub in Munich, aimed at tailoring models to international customers.

It is also in talks with Stellantis to use the European carmaker’s idle assembly plant in Brampton, Ontario, near Toronto, according to Bloomberg. The company declined to comment on the potential Canadian venture.
summary_zh: 中國電動車製造商零跑汽車計劃在歐洲設立研發中心並在加拿大建立組裝廠，同時上調海外銷售目標50%，加速全球擴張。

headline: U.S. fighter jet shot down in Iran, one crew member rescued, MS NOW reports
excerpt: It is unclear if the plane was shot down or went down for another reason.
full_text:
One crew member was rescued Friday after Iranian forces shot down a U.S. fighter jet, MS NOW reported.

The U.S. was searching for the second member of the F-15 aircraft's crew, whose whereabouts were unknown, according to MS Now, which cited two U.S. officials.

The Pentagon and U.S. Central Command didn't immediately comment. President Donald Trump has been briefed on the U.S. aircraft going down and the search for the crew, a White House official said.

It appeared to be the first known loss of a U.S. jet in the country since the war in Iran started in late February.

Meanwhile, a second U.S. aircraft involved in the war crashed on Friday, and the pilot was rescued, an official told MS Now.

The downing of the jet comes at a delicate time, when the U.S. has showed few signs of slowing its assault on Iran and reports of potential peace talks did not yield a breakthrough. Trump told NBC News on Friday that the aircraft being shot down would not affect possible negotiations with Iran.

The war has now gone on for more than a month, and the death toll from the conflict is nearing 5,100 across the Middle East, according to MS NOW. It has suffocated tanker traffic through the critical Strait of Hormuz and threatened supplies of crude oil, fertilizer and other key commodities.

Trump claimed in a social media post Friday that with more time, the U.S. could "easily" open the strait, "TAKE THE OIL, & MAKE A FORTUNE."

Trump also threatened late Thursday to escalate attacks on Iranian infrastructure. He said the U.S. "hasn't even started destroying what's left in Iran," citing bridges and electric power plants.

In remarks Wednesday, Trump said the U.S. would attack Iran "back to the Stone Ages."
summary_zh: 美國戰鬥機在伊朗被擊落，一名機組人員獲救，另一名機組人員下落不明，美軍正在進行搜救行動。

headline: Trump threatens to destroy Iranian infrastructure, saying its government 'knows what has to be done'
excerpt: The threat comes a day after he said in a nationwide address that the U.S. military will be hitting Tehran "extremely hard" for the next two or three weeks.
full_text:
Anadolu | Anadolu | Getty Images

U.S. President Donald Trump threatened to destroy Iran's bridges and power plants, saying the "New Regime leadership knows what has to be done, and has to be done, FAST!" in a Truth Social post late on Thursday.

His words come as the recently constructed B1 bridge near Tehran was destroyed in an airstrike. Eight people died in the attack, according to Iranian state media.

Trump's post said the U.S. "hasn't even started destroying what's left in Iran. Bridges next, then Electric Power Plants!" In his post, Trump did not elaborate on what needed to be "done," but said the U.S. "hasn't even started destroying what's left in Iran."

On Friday, Trump said in another Truth Social post: "With a little more time, we can easily OPEN THE HORMUZ STRAIT, TAKE THE OIL,& MAKE A FORTUNE."

"IT WOULD BE A "GUSHER" FOR THE WORLD???" said the post.

On Friday, operations were suspended at the Abu Dhabi's Hadshan gas facilities, after debris fell following a "successful interception by air defence systems."

"Operations have been suspended while authorities respond to a fire. No injuries have been reported," Abu Dhabi media center said on X.

Trump's proclamations came as a U.S. fighter jet went down over Iran, MS Now reported, citing a U.S. official. The U.S. Central Command, which oversees the region, and Iranian authorities did not immediately respond to a request for comment.

Trump's latest threat came after a Wednesday speech in which he said the U.S. military would hit Iran "extremely hard" for the next two or three weeks. He added that the U.S. would "bring them back to the Stone Ages where they belong."

Hours after his speech, Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi struck a defiant tone on X, saying that "there was no oil or gas being pumped in the Middle East back then," referring to Trump's stone age remarks.

"Are POTUS and Americans who put him in office sure that they want to turn back the clock?" Araghchi said.

Iran has effectively shut tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz, a vital global oil route, after the U.S. and Israel attacked the country on Feb. 28.

'Stone age' threats

Trump has repeatedly threatened to send Iran back to the "stone age" as the war entered its second month and the U.S. military build-up in the Middle East showed no signs of slowing.

Despite reports of overtures from the U.S., including ceasefires and a 15-point peace plan to end the war, Iran has publicly contradicted multiple reports about negotiations with the Trump administration on numerous occasions.

Tehran had described the 15-point proposal as "extremely maximalist and unreasonable," according to an Al Jazeera report on March 25, citing a high-ranking diplomatic source.

Trump said Wednesday that Iran's "New Regime President" had asked Washington for a ceasefire, a claim that Tehran has denied. Trump has not specified who the "President" is.

"We will consider when Hormuz Strait is open, free, and clear. Until then, we are blasting Iran into oblivion or, as they say, back to the Stone Ages!!!," he wrote.

watch now

Attacks on power plants could constitute a war crime and violate international law, legal experts said.

In a letter dated Thursday and signed by over 100 law experts, the group said international law prohibits attacks on "objects indispensable to the survival of civilians, and the attacks threatened by Trump, if implemented, could entail war crimes."

Trump had also earlier said that he could target water desalination plants in Iran.

China, Russia and France veto

The Gulf Cooperation Council on Thursday called on the United Nations Security Council to take "all necessary measures to ensure the immediate cessation of Iranian aggressions against the Council states."

The six countries in the Gulf Cooperation Council — Bahrain, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar, Saudi Arabia and the United Arab Emirates — have come under attack from Iranian missiles and drones as the war entered its second month.

watch now

The Kuwait Petroleum Corporation said that its Mina al-Ahmadi refinery was hit by drones early on Friday.

Jassim Albudaiwi, Secretary-General of the Gulf Cooperation Council, said that while the bloc does not seek war, Iran had "exceeded all red lines" and described Tehran's attacks as "treacherous."

Bahrain, the current rotating president of the Security Council, has led an effort to pass a U.N. resolution to ​authorize "all necessary means" to protect commercial shipping in and around the Strait of Hormuz.

But the proposal reportedly stalled after veto-wielding Security Council members China, Russia and France objected to the draft resolution, which would have authorized military action against Iran.
summary_zh: 特朗普威脅摧毀伊朗基礎設施，包括橋樑和電力廠，並要求伊朗新政權迅速採取行動。

headline: U.S. payrolls rose by 178,000 in March, more than expected; unemployment at 4.3%
excerpt: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase by 59,000 in March, with the unemployment rate holding at 4.4%.
full_text:
watch now

The U.S. labor market bounced back in March, with job creation much stronger than expected though the broader picture of a slow-growth labor market held intact.

Nonfarm payrolls rose a seasonally adjusted 178,000 during the month, a reversal from the 133,000 decline in February and better than the Dow Jones consensus estimate for 59,000, the Bureau of Labor Statistics reported Friday. February's number was revised down by 41,000 while January was revised up by 34,000 to 160,000, putting the three-month average around 68,000.

The unemployment rate edged lower to 4.3%, though that was largely from a sharp reduction in the labor force.

"The bottom line is March was somewhat encouraging, but it's been a rocky year for the labor market with almost no hiring since last April," said Heather Long, chief economist at Navy Federal Credit Union. "The March data will keep the Federal Reserve on hold, but no one is declaring victory yet. It's likely to be a tough spring for job seekers."

As has been the case, health care was responsible for much of the growth, with the sector adding 76,000 jobs. A strike at health-care provider Kaiser Permanente in February hit the sector. The BLS said ambulatory health care services rose by 54,000, with 35,000 coming from the strike workers returning.

Construction saw an increase of 26,000, while transportation and warehousing posted a gain of 21,000.

On the downside, the federal government saw a loss of 18,000, while financial activities lost 15,000.

Though the unemployment rate posted a decline, the move largely came from a decline of 396,000 in the labor force. The share of working-age Americans in the labor force fell to 61.9%, its lowest since November 2021.

The survey of households, which is used to compute the unemployment rate, showed 64,000 fewer people holding jobs. An alternative unemployment figure that counts discouraged workers and those holding part-time jobs for economic reasons edged up to 8%. Long-term unemployment continued to be elevated, though the average weeks of unemployment fell to 25.3.

Wages also rose less than expected, with average hourly earnings up just 0.2% for the month and 3.5% from a year ago. Economists had expected respective readings of 0.3% and 3.7%. The annual increase was the lowest since May 2021. Hours worked declined 34.2, down one-tenth from February.

The U.S. stock market was closed in observance of the Good Friday holiday. Stock market futures were slightly negative following the report. The bond market continued to trade, with Treasury yields higher ahead of an early close.

The report comes amid a changing labor market, with the economy needing to add fewer jobs to keep the broader employment picture stable. The St. Louis Federal Reserve estimated recently that payroll growth of as little as 15,000 could keep the unemployment rate steady.

Federal Reserve officials have been weighing the jobs data as they plot their intentions regarding interest rates. Most policymakers have been content to watch the data unfold and take a patient approach, though a few have pushed for interest rate cuts to head off labor market weakness.

With inflation well above the Fed's target and energy prices surging as the Iran war continues, markets expect little movement from the central bank this year. Following the jobs report, futures pointed to virtually no probability of a move at the April 28-29 Federal Open Market Committee meeting and a 77.5% probability the Fed will stay on hold through the end of the year, according to the CME Group's FedWatch tool.
summary_zh: 美國3月非農就業人數增加17.8萬，遠超預期的5.9萬，失業率下降至4.3%，顯示勞動力市場出現反彈。

headline: OpenAI's Fidji Simo takes medical leave, announces leadership changes
excerpt: OpenAI President Greg Brockman will oversee product in Simo's absence.
full_text:
Fidji Simo, OpenAI's product and business chief, announced several leadership changes on Friday and revealed she is taking a significant medical leave because of a worsening neuroimmune condition.

OpenAI hired Simo in May, and her condition, Postural Orthostatic Tachycardia Syndrome, or POTS, relapsed a few weeks before she started in the role. She told staffers in a memo on Friday that the past month has been "particularly rough health-wise," and she decided she needs to take several weeks off to recover.

"For my entire time here, I've postponed medical tests and new therapies to stay completely focused on the job and not miss a single day of work," Simo wrote in the memo, which was viewed by CNBC. "I took time off for the first time two weeks before the break for some medical tests, and it's now clear that I've pushed a little too far and I really need to try new interventions to stabilize my health."

In an interview with CNBC in March, Simo said she was diagnosed with POTS in 2019, and she saw more than 40 specialists as she tried to understand her condition. Patients with POTS have difficulty keeping their blood pressure steady, which can cause symptoms like dizziness, fatigue and chest pains, according to the Cleveland Clinic. The condition can be challenging for health-care providers to diagnose.

Simo joined OpenAI after serving as CEO of Instacart , and she previously spent more than a decade in a number of leadership roles at Meta .

OpenAI President Greg Brockman will oversee product in Simo's absence, she said. Simo also announced that Brad Lightcap, OpenAI's chief operating officer, will transition to a new role focused on "special projects." He will report directly to OpenAI CEO Sam Altman.

Denise Dresser, the company's chief revenue officer, will take over most of Lightcap's responsibilities and report directly to Simo. Dresser will not oversee Lightcap's government or OpenAI for Countries work, which is now being folded under the company's strategy organization.

Additionally, Simo announced that Kate Rouch, OpenAI's marketing chief, has decided to step down to focus on her cancer recovery. Rouch was diagnosed with late-stage breast cancer roughly a year and a half ago, right after she stepped into her role at OpenAI.

"I love this job. I love this team. Which is exactly why I didn't step away and did both — lead at OpenAI while going through intense cancer treatment," Rouch wrote in a post on LinkedIn. "It's the hardest thing I've ever done. At a certain point, you have to be honest about your limits. I've reached mine."

Simo said Rouch will return to a more narrowly-scoped role when her health allows, and OpenAI will lead a search for her replacement.

"We have a strong leadership team focused on our biggest priorities: advancing frontier research, growing our global user base of nearly 1 billion users, and powering enterprise use cases," an OpenAI spokesperson said in a statement. "We're well-positioned to keep executing with continuity and momentum."
summary_zh: OpenAI產品及業務主管Fidji Simo因神經免疫疾病惡化宣布請醫療假，同時宣布多項領導層變動。

headline: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later
excerpt: A year after his "liberation day," Trump's trade war has reshaped how companies in industries such as retail and autos are modeling economic and policy risk.
full_text:
A year after President Donald Trump declared his "liberation day" and imposed sweeping tariffs on imports, kicking off a wave of economic and political uncertainty, some companies are still feeling the effects.

While some industries have emerged largely unscathed — having weathered twists and turns of several tariff iterations — others, such as retail, automotive, consumer packaged goods and pharmaceuticals, are navigating a new reality in global supply chains.

"Leadership at U.S. corporations really had to think about where we buy from versus whether we can import or not," said Venky Ramesh, a supply chain expert with AlixPartners. "Around 80% to 85% of the costs were absorbed domestically, meaning either the U.S. corporations had to take the hit, or they passed it on to the customers, or a mix of both."

On April 2, 2025, in the White House's Rose Garden, Trump announced broad country-by-country tariffs, as well as a 10% baseline levy on countries that weren't specifically listed in that declaration. Those tariff policies fluctuated wildly over the following months as Trump made deals and walked back some of the most extreme duties.

With ever-changing trade and tariff policies, companies have been forced to be more flexible and diversify their supply chains over the past year. Moving operations out of countries such as China, Vietnam or Mexico meant import cost savings, but for many industries, it was a tall task.

Ramesh said he saw clients in the first few months making "aggressive" changes to get ahead of the tariff costs, but because those policies kept shifting, companies begin to move slower and invest resources into scenario modeling.

"Moving supplier bases cannot happen overnight," Ramesh said. "I think what companies are doing is they're taking it gradually, so they want to make sure that they are well-diversified."

On Feb. 20, the Supreme Court ruled that the country-specific "reciprocal" tariffs Trump imposed under the International Emergency Economic Powers Act of 1977, or IEEPA, were unconstitutional. But hours after the ruling, Trump announced a new "global tariff" rate of 10% under a separate statute, Section 122 of the Trade Act of 1974, for a period of 150 days. He later said he would increase global tariffs to 15%.

Meanwhile, those imposed under Section 232 of the Trade Expansion Act of 1962 — intended to target specific imports that threaten national security — remain in place. Section 232 tariffs largely affected imports of steel, semiconductors, aluminum and other products.

Still, Ramesh said, overall imports into the U.S. in 2025 were actually higher than in the previous year, especially as companies pulled forward inventory in the first few months of the year.

Ultimately, he said, he believes the past year of tariffs has culturally shifted the way U.S. companies operate.

"The things that would stick are supply chain being a very, very critical component of any company. I think that has really changed over the last year," he said. "Corporations are not going to make the rash decisions. They're not as susceptible to these changes as they were a year ago. They've stabilized more."

As the U.S. enters its second year of Trump-imposed tariffs, here's how some of the consumer-facing sectors have fared.

Retail

Eduardo Munoz Alvarez | Corbis News | Stephanie Keith | Bloomberg | Spencer Platt | Erik McGregor | Lightrocket | Getty Images

One year into Trump's trade war, the retail industry has been disproportionately affected by tariffs. Mega-retailers such as Walmart , which have a range of different revenue streams and deep negotiating power, have emerged relatively unscathed, while smaller businesses have been crushed.

Several retailers said that although they initially estimated they would see significant hits to revenue and profitability after the new tariffs were imposed, they've since taken a new approach, aiming to not rely too heavily on any single country for imports or manufacturing. And, for the most part, they've managed to avoid the massive impact that many projected at the start of the trade war.

Home Depot 's chief financial officer, CFO Richard McPhail, told CNBC in late February that the company is pressing ahead with its goal of limiting any one country outside the U.S. to 10% of the company's purchases. More than half of what Home Depot sells is sourced in the U.S.

The retail supply chain has been forced to become more nimble in the past year, according to Max Kahn, the president of Coresight Research.

"One of the things that really started back with the pandemic is that retailers have become much better at building flexibility in their supply chains, and that got accelerated a lot last year with tariffs," Kahn said. "Shocks to the system or unexpected events are a little bit more business as usual now."

Tariffs have also meant higher costs for shoppers. Retailers such as Walmart, Best Buy and Macy's have raised prices of some items, while also looking for...
summary_zh: 特朗普關稅政策實施一年後，零售、汽車等多個行業仍在應對其持續影響，企業重新評估全球供應鏈策略。

headline: Chinese chip firms hit record high revenue driven by the AI boom and U.S. curbs
excerpt: Chinese chip companies have benefited from strong domestic demand for AI as U.S. tech curbs have bolstered local firms.
full_text:
Blackdovfx | Istock | Getty Images

Chinese semiconductor firms have reported record revenue last year driven by AI demand, a shortage of memory chips and U.S. export restrictions that have pushed Beijing to bolster its homegrown tech industry.

Analysts and the companies themselves are also expecting further revenue surges this year, underscoring how Chinese chip players are capitalizing on strong demand from domestic tech giants looking to build their AI infrastructure.

U.S. export restrictions on China's tech sector over the last few years have added "rocket fuel" on chip demand, amplifying growth from other areas like electric vehicles and AI data centers, according to Paul Triolo, a partner at Albright Stonebridge Group.

Semiconductor Manufacturing International Co. (SMIC), China's largest chip manufacturer, said revenue for 2025 rose 16% from a year ago to a record $9.3 billion. Revenue could top $11 billion in 2026, according to LSEG analyst estimates.

Hua Hong, another Chinese chipmaker, said fourth-quarter revenue came in at a record $659.9 million and forecast sales of between $650 million and $660 million.

Moore Threads, which is aiming to rival Nvidia , guided that 2025 revenue would be between 1.45 billion yuan ($209.8 million) and 1.52 billion yuan, a 231% to 247% year-on-year increase.

What is driving sales records?

There are multiple factors at play. The growth of electric vehicles and related infrastructure has provided support for less-advanced or "mature node" semiconductors, while demand for more advanced chips is "through the roof because of AI," Triolo told CNBC.

U.S. restrictions over the past few years, which cut off China from key technologies, have accelerated a self-sufficiency push from Beijing to wean itself off American tech.

watch now

More recently, U.S. export curbs on Nvidia's chips to China has prompted Beijing to encourage local firms to buy domestic alternatives, with companies like Huawei stepping in to fill the void, even if the performance of their semiconductors lags the U.S.

"While China does not yet lead in peak GPU performance, these homegrown solutions are filling the domestic 'compute gap' and driving record revenues," Parv Sharma, senior analyst at Counterpoint Research, told CNBC.

Memory chip players in China have also seen a boost. Memory, a key component for AI data centers and consumer electronics, is in short supply globally while demand remains high. This has led to an unprecedented spike in prices of memory chips.

ChangXin Memory Technologies (CXMT), one of China's leading memory players, saw a 130% year-on-year jump in revenue to more than 55 billion yuan ($8 billion), Bloomberg reported last week, citing people familiar with the matter.

High-bandwidth memory (HBM) is a type of high-end memory required for AI. The market is dominated by the world's three biggest players in the space who make this type of memory — Samsung, SK Hynix and Micron . Export restrictions on HBM to China have provided an opening for CXMT, even as its technology trails the leading players by some way, Phelix Lee, senior equity analyst at Morningstar, told CNBC.

"After HBM is restricted into China, CXMT is picking up as the only homegrown alternative, so even the technologically inferior HBM2 or HBM2e are met with enthusiasm," Lee said.

watch now

HBM2 and HBM2e are technologies that Samsung and SK Hynix began producing around 2016. CXMT is expected to produce HBM3 this year.

The expertise gained from manufacturing memory chips could lead to advances in other chips, such as GPUs, Albright Stonebridge Group's Triolo said.

"All the memory fabs in China are now incubators for advanced process technology in ways inconceivable before the October 2022 US export controls," Triolo told CNBC.

China's continued challenges

Even as China's semiconductor players posted record revenues, they continued to lag behind companies in the U.S., South Korea, Europe and Taiwan when it comes to technological capability.

SMIC and Hua Hong are still unable to manufacture the most advanced chips in the world at scale like market leader Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co . (TSMC). That's because they are not able to access the most advanced tools produced by ASML in the Netherlands due to export restrictions.

While efforts are underway to create domestic alternatives, the complexity of the technology means it is a big task.

"As demand remains high, Chinese semiconductor firms remain under huge pressure from US export controls, and domestic alternatives have become increasingly available in many subsectors, but not across the board," Triolo said.

"China is unique in basically attempting to recreate huge swathes of the entire semiconductor supply chain, and this naturally is quite challenging and will require more time to overcome US controls in key areas."

And while current growth is being driven by "import dependence replacement," there is a risk of overcapacity for less-advanced ch...
summary_zh: 中國芯片企業受惠於人工智能需求旺盛及美國出口管制，去年收入創歷史新高，預期今年將持續增長。

headline: 'Chasing vibes' — OpenAI's M&A strategy gets more confusing with TBPN purchase
excerpt: Over 10 months after shelling out an eye-popping $6.4 billion for Jony Ive's nascent devices startup, OpenAI announced it's buying media company TBPN.
full_text:
Over 10 months after shelling out an eye-popping $6.4 billion for Jony Ive's nascent devices startup, OpenAI announced another surprising deal on Thursday, snapping up a media business that streams a three-hour daily tech talk show.

For a company that's facing intensifying investor scrutiny as it racks up billions of dollars in losses tied to its infrastructure buildout, OpenAI's M&A strategy is tough to pin down. After the startup, now valued at over $850 billion, announced its purchase of Technology Business Programming Network, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman said in a Thursday post on X that, "TBPN is my favorite tech show."

"I don't expect them to go any easier on us, am sure I'll do my part to help enable that with occasional stupid decisions," Altman wrote.

It's a pivotal moment for OpenAI, which is prepping for an IPO as soon as this year. The company's core products — its popular artificial intelligence models and ChatGPT chatbot — face intensifying competition from Google , Anthropic and Elon Musk's xAI, which is likely to hit the public market first through the anticipated offering of SpaceX.

OpenAI has been reeling in its spending expectations and last month shuttered its Sora video app that quickly went viral after its launch six months earlier. It's not readily clear how TBPN fits into OpenAI's strategy, but the AI market is moving so quickly that the most logical moves today may make little sense tomorrow.

"When you have more and more disruptive competitors showing up, they need to build things that give people a unique reason to pick ChatGPT over other AI platforms," Daniel Newman, CEO of Futurum Group, said in an interview. "They are kind of chasing vibes a little bit."

While not all of OpenAI's acquisitions will pay off, Newman said the company, fresh off a $122 billion funding close, can afford to experiment. He called TBPN "a fairly small bet for a lot of attention."

OpenAI didn't disclose deal terms. The company didn't respond to a request for comment.

OpenAI's biggest deal to date by far was the purchase of Ive's io, which pushed the company into the complex world of hardware development for the first time. Ive is legendary in the space for designing the iPod, iPhone, iPad and many other gadgets in his years at Apple , and is angling to get OpenAI's first devices to market as soon as next year.

In December, OpenAI hired Google's Albert Lee to lead corporate development, a sign that the company was on the hunt for more targets. It's purchased several startups across a range of industries since then, including software startup Astral, cybersecurity startup Promptfoo, and health-tech startup Torch.

OpenAI's last big splashy acquisition came in the form of a developer rather than a company. In February, the company hired Peter Steinberger, the Austrian software developer behind the viral AI assistant OpenClaw. Much like the surprise TBPN announcement, news of the Steinberger hire lit up social media.

Newman said Altman is likely trying to figure out the company's next focus area, and whether there's "an M&A path to relevance."

"He hasn't succeeded with a lot of other big, ambitious ideas yet," Newman said.

Founded in 2024 by hosts John Coogan and Jordi Hays, TBPN quickly rose to prominence within Silicon Valley, cultivating a loyal audience of investors, founders and tech workers. The company has less than 60,000 subscribers on YouTube, but high-profile guests like Altman, Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella and Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg regularly appear on the show.

In a memo to employees on Thursday, Fidji Simo, OpenAI's CEO of Applications, said the company believes it has a "responsibility to help create a space for a real, constructive conversation about the changes AI creates." OpenAI will leverage TBPN's "amazing comms and marketing instincts," Simo said, though she added that TBPN will make its "own editorial decisions."

Andrew Frank, an analyst at Gartner, said TBPN wasn't on his "bingo card" as an acquisition candidate. But he said it could make sense if seen as a way for OpenAI to counter the narrative that AI is a danger.

"If you're a company like OpenAI, where everyone is kind of leaning forward for news, I think that you just need an established outlet through which you can communicate with the broader world," Frank said in an interview.

Paul Nary, an M&A professor at the Wharton School of the University of Pennsylvania, doesn't quite get it.

"OpenAI acquiring @tbpn makes zero sense to me," he wrote on X.

In an interview with CNBC, Nary elaborated on his thinking, and said OpenAI's explanation didn't help much.

"We'll give you editorial control, but you'll still be involved in our company," Nary said. "So is there a conflict of interest there, and what does it mean for the business going forward?"

Nary said media and entertainment transactions are some of the most likely to fail, but he suggested that TBPN's size doesn't present a lot of financial liability to OpenAI. He do...
summary_zh: OpenAI在十個月內斥資64億美元收購Jony Ive設備公司後，再次宣布收購媒體公司TBPN，其並購策略引發投資者質疑。

headline: Japan's Sakura Internet jumps 20% as Microsoft plans $10 billion AI push with SoftBank
excerpt: Microsoft said it plans to invest $10 billion in Japan between 2026 and 2029 to build AI infrastructure.
full_text:
Shares of Sakura Internet surged as much as 20.2% Friday after Microsoft said it has begun discussions with the Japanese cloud company and SoftBank to develop artificial intelligence infrastructure in Japan.

Microsoft said it plans to invest $10 billion in Japan between 2026 and 2029 to build AI infrastructure, strengthen cybersecurity and train 1 million engineers and developers by 2030.

Sakura Internet, which provides internet infrastructure services using domestic data centers, and Japanese telecommunications giant SoftBank Corp. will partner with Microsoft to provide AI computing resources, including graphics processing units located in Japan.

The announcement came during a visit to Japan by Microsoft Vice Chair and President Brad Smith, who met Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi.

Smith said the investment comes as demand for cloud and AI services grows in Japan. Around one in five working-age people in the country use generative AI tools, compared with the global average of about one in six, according to Microsoft's AI Diffusion Report.

The partnership will allow data to be processed in Japan and support the development of advanced AI systems such as domestic large language models, Microsoft said in a statement.

SoftBank and Microsoft Japan are also discussing a joint solution that would allow Microsoft Azure customers to use SoftBank's AI computing platform.

Shares of Softbank Group were up 0.22% in Friday trade, while SoftBank Corp. rose 1.02%
summary_zh: 微軟宣布計劃於2026至2029年間在日本投資100億美元發展AI基礎設施，與樂天和軟銀合作，帶動樂天互聯網股價急升逾20%。

headline: Asia-Pacific markets mostly rise in Easter trade on hopes for Hormuz reopening
excerpt: South Korea's Kospi led gains in the region while Japan's Nikkei 225 also opened higher. The Australian and Hong Kong markets were closed for the Easter weekend.
full_text:
Asia-Pacific markets traded mostly higher Friday, after Iran and Oman were reportedly drafting a protocol to "monitor transit" through the Strait of Hormuz, raising hopes that the crucial waterway could partially reopen.

Tanker traffic through the key oil-shipping route "should be supervised and coordinated" with the two countries, said Kazem Gharibabadi, Iran's deputy foreign minister of legal and international affairs, according to Iranian state news agency IRNA.

Oil prices surged Thursday before markets closed for the Good Friday holiday. U.S. crude futures jumped almost 12% to trade at $112.06 per barrel, while global benchmark Brent was up around 8% at $109.24.

The spot price for current physical cargoes of Brent crude oil soared Thursday to $141.36, the highest level since the 2008 financial crisis, according to S&P Global.

South Korea's Kospi led gains in the region, rising 2.74% and closing at 5,377.3, while the small-cap Kosdaq rose 0.74% to 1,063.75.

South Korean President Lee Jae Myung will meet French President Emmanuel Macron for a summit meeting Friday.

The Blue House said in a statement that the two countries are expected to upgrade their relationship to a 'Global Strategic Partnership,' marking the first upgrade in 22 years.

The Korea Times reported that the two sides are expected to discuss expanding cooperation in trade and investment, as well as in sectors such as artificial intelligence, nuclear energy and space.

Japan's Nikkei 225 was up 1.26% and ended the day at 53,123.49, driven by consumer non-cyclical stocks, and the broad-based Topix was 0.93% higher and closed at 3,645.19, powered by energy stocks.

On Friday, Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama reportedly said that the impact of U.S. President Donald Trump's nationwide address on Wednesday was "quite significant," adding that speculative activity was seen in both crude oil futures and currency markets.

Yields on Japanese government bonds had also hit records, with the 2-year JGB yield reaching 1.39%, its highest level since 1995. The benchmark 10-year JGB bond yield was at 2.399%, its highest since 1999.

The CSI 300 index in mainland China reversed earlier gains, falling 0.85% to 4,440.79.

The Australian and Hong Kong markets were closed for the Easter weekend.

Overnight in the U.S., markets saw a volatile session amid rising oil prices, but the major indexes ended little changed heading into the holiday weekend, with the blue-chip Dow declining 61.07 points, or 0.13%.

The S&P 500 advanced 0.11%, and the Nasdaq Composite gained 0.18%.

— CNBC's Kevin Breuninger, Lisa Kailai Han and Sean Conlon contributed to this report.
summary_zh: 亞太股市因伊朗與阿曼據報草擬荷姆茲海峽通行監管協議而普遍上升，市場對該關鍵油運航道重新開放寄予希望。

headline: 證監會料11月16日推無紙證券制度　梁仲賢：對股市發展有好處
excerpt:
證監會預計今年11月16日實施無紙證券市場制度。

證監會市場監察部執行董事梁仲賢表示，本港2600間上市公司將會參與無紙制度，預計未來5年內會陸續將實物股票數碼化，但強調不會強迫股民將實物股票轉為電子股票，證監會未來7個月會加強投資者教育工作，同時確保業界做好系統提升工作。

梁仲賢在一個電台節目又說，香港股市交投活躍，外界都認為效率很高，但未必知道背後運作需要大量紙張，若情況持續會阻礙市場發展，推行證券「無紙化」長遠對股市發展有好處。



編輯：潘潔平
summary_zh: 證監會計劃11月16日推行無紙證券制度，涉及2600間上市公司，梁仲賢認為此舉長遠有利股市發展。

headline: 分析指內地大型車企「出海」需求大　海外設廠或成為趨勢
excerpt:
中東緊張局勢持續，導致油價急升。高歌證券金融首席分析師聶振邦表示，市場相信美以伊戰事很快結束，新能源汽車銷售未必會受到很大推動，而且油價上升會推高輪胎等零部件價格，電動車的電力來源亦可能來自火力發電，間接與燃油有關。

不過，他相信，油價最恐慌時期已過去，短期回落機會較大，雙碳目標等國策有助提升新能源汽車滲透率。

內地「以舊換新」補貼政策調整，由定額改為按車價比例補貼，新能源汽車報廢更新可獲補貼12%，上限2萬元人民幣。聶振邦認為，中高價車輛較受惠，入門級及平價車輛購買力，則在政策調整前已提前釋放。

他又提到，大型車企「出海」需求很大，因為單靠內銷未必能夠完全消化國內產能。以比亞迪為例，上月出口比例達40%，認為提高至50%會較合適。另外，出口利潤率吸引，例如在歐洲銷售汽車的利潤率達6%至7%，內地則不足5%。

他認為，考慮到關稅及運輸成本，內地車廠在歐洲、南美、巴西、墨西哥等地設廠，將成為趨勢。



編輯：宋家樑
summary_zh: 分析師指內地車企出口比例高、內銷消化不足，認為在歐洲、南美等地設廠將成趨勢，以規避關稅並提高利潤率。

headline: 市監總局要求美團、淘寶閃購、京東強化食品安全主體責任
excerpt:
國家市場監管總局發布新聞稿，本周四召開外賣平台企業行政指導會，要求美團、阿里巴巴旗下淘寶閃購、京東，強化企業食品安全主體責任，採取切實有效措施，保障消費者飲食安全，並且盡快開展自查整改。

當局指，通過推動「互聯網+明廚亮灶」、鼓勵外賣騎手參與食品安全監督等方式，共建食品安全社會共治新格局。

市監總局指導這3家平台企業，嚴格落實即將實施的「網絡餐飲服務經營者落實食品安全主體責任監督管理規定」。

內地早前公布，6月1日起將實施有關規定，明確外賣平台企業務必將落實食品安全主體責任，擺在企業經營管理核心位置，並嵌入日常營運每個環節、流程及決策，保證餐飲食品安全。



編輯：方嘉莉
summary_zh: 國家市場監管總局召開行政指導會，要求美團、淘寶閃購、京東等外賣平台強化食品安全主體責任，並落實新規定保障消費者飲食安全。

headline: 人行下周二開展8000億元人民幣買斷式逆回購
excerpt:
人民銀行公布，為保持銀行體系流動性充裕，下星期二開展8000億元人民幣買斷式逆回購操作，期限3個月，以固定數量、利率招標、多重價位中標方式開展。

買斷式逆回購操作規模較下星期到期量減少3000億元。

據路透統計，4月到期量合共1.7萬億元，當中1.1萬億元下周三到期，6000億元將於4月15日到期。



編輯：方嘉莉
summary_zh: 人民銀行下周二將開展8000億元人民幣買斷式逆回購操作，期限3個月，以維持銀行體系流動性充裕。

headline: 美國3月非農業新增職位17.8萬個　遠超預期
excerpt:
美國3月非農業就業職位增加17.8萬個，遠高於預期的6萬個，創15個月以來最大增幅。2月就業職位向下修訂為減少13.3萬個，減幅大過前值的9.2萬個。

上月醫療保健職位增幅最大，新增7.6萬個職位。製造業亦增加1.5萬個職位，但去年初以來累計仍減少8.2萬個。聯邦政府職位則減少1.8萬個，由2024年10月高位以來，累計減少35.5萬個，減幅近12%。

3月失業率回落0.1個百分點至4.3%，勞動參與率自新冠疫情以來首次跌穿62%。每周平均工時減少0.1小時，降至34.2小時，年薪增速創近5年來最慢。

分析認為，醫療人員結束罷工，加上氣溫回升，以致上月就業職位反彈幅度超出預期，但數據無法充分反映中東衝突帶來的影響，就業市場面臨的下行風險正在加劇。

就業數據公布後，美債孳息率上升，10年期債息徘徊4.34厘以上，30年期債息升至4.91厘，兩年期債息升至3.84厘。不過，由於耶穌受難日，債市半日市，交投淡靜。



編輯：方嘉莉
summary_zh: 美國3月非農業新增職位17.8萬個，遠超預期的6萬個，創15個月新高；但失業率回落至4.3%，勞動參與率跌穿62%，就業市場面臨下行風險。

headline: 美國將對部分進口專利藥物及製藥成分加徵100%關稅
excerpt:
美國白宮在當地星期四發公告，指出總統特朗普已簽署文件，依據1962年貿易擴展法當中的條款，美國將對部分進口專利藥物及製藥成分，加徵100%關稅，並調整對進口鋼、鋁、銅及相關衍生產品加徵的從價關稅。

根據公告，針對進口專利藥及製藥成分的關稅措施，將於120日後對特定大型企業生效，對小型企業就在180日後生效。對於產自歐盟、日本、韓國、瑞士及列支敦士登的進口藥物，將根據貿易協定適用15%的關稅。對於產自英國的進口藥物，將適用較低關稅，具體標準以近期與英國達成的藥物協議為準。對進口仿製藥及其製藥成分暫不徵收關稅。

白宮說措施旨在強化美國國內製藥業基礎，維護美國的經濟和國家安全利益。



編輯：羅宇光
summary_zh: 美國總統特朗普簽署文件，將對部分進口專利藥物及製藥成分加徵100%關稅，並對鋼、鋁、銅等商品調整關稅，措施旨在強化美國國內製藥業。

headline: 卓永興稱香港年金計劃去年錄得近90億元保費總額　按年增逾一倍
excerpt:
政務司副司長卓永興表示，政府統計處預測，至2043年，本港每三人就有一人是65歲或以上長者，為社會帶來挑戰，亦隱藏巨大銀髮經濟機遇；舉例香港按揭證券有限公司的香港年金計劃去年全年錄得近90億元保費總額，按年增長超過一倍。

卓永興出席一個退休博覽時指出，加強長者理財教育及財務保障亦是政府的其中工作重點，按證公司去年已為長者舉辦超過150場理財策劃講座，並與機構或政府部門合作教育公眾定立遺囑持久授權書和預設醫療指示。

卓永興亦提到，在政府積極推動下，供應軟餐食肆數目大幅增加，包括多間連鎖快餐店均已推出堂食軟餐。他又說，當局致力推動樂齡科技的研發及商品化，現時科技園及數碼港合共有超過130間從事與樂齡科技相關工作的企業，並為有關初創企業提供支援。



編輯：李俊傑
summary_zh: 政務司副司長卓永興表示，香港年金計劃去年錄得近90億元保費總額，按年增長超過一倍，政府同時推動長者理財教育、軟餐飲食及樂齡科技發展以應對人口老齡化。

headline: 香港位列全球第五大商品貿易經濟體　林健鋒：反映對外貿易競爭力
excerpt:
根據世界貿易組織最新發表的《全球貿易展望與統計》報告，香港躍升為全球第五大商品貿易經濟體。行政會議成員、職業訓練局主席林健鋒表示，這項成績令人振奮，充分反映香港對外貿易的強大韌力和競爭力。

林健鋒指出，過去一年環球經濟面對地緣政治及貿易保護主義等多重挑戰，香港依然憑藉「一國兩制」的獨特優勢、自由開放的貿易政策，以及高度國際化的營商環境，在商品貿易總額錄得17.5%的顯著增長，排名連升兩位，實屬難能可貴。

他強調，今年是國家「十五五」規劃開局之年，特區政府正全力編製香港首份五年規劃。香港應繼續發揮「超級聯繫人」和「超級增值人」的角色，積極協助內地企業「走出去」，同時開拓新興市場，進一步鞏固國際貿易中心地位，為香港經濟注入更多新增長點。



編輯：李俊傑
summary_zh: 香港躍升為全球第五大商品貿易經濟體，林健鋒認為反映香港對外貿易的強大競爭力和韌力。

headline: 分析指內地3月新能源汽車銷量符合預期　「內卷」壓力緩和
excerpt:
內地主要車廠3月新能源汽車銷量或交付量按月增長，按年亦大多數上升，表現較好的蔚來交付量按年升近1.4倍至逾3.5萬輛，但比亞迪按年跌20%至30萬輛。

高歌證券金融首席分析師聶振邦認為，3月銷量表現符合預期，大型車企錄得倒退，由於基數較高，不排除會加大力度增加出口，由於出口業務利潤較高。

被稱為「蔚小理」的蔚來、小鵬、理想，去年第4季都錄得盈利，小鵬及蔚來更首次錄得盈利，理想單季盈利則按年跌逾90%。

聶振邦指，蔚來首季交付量按年升98%，收入預測升1倍，估計有望保持盈利。理想預期首季收入逾200億元人民幣，按年跌16.7%至21.3%。他指，即使利潤率僅1%至2%，仍有望錄得盈利，至於小鵬收入亦有倒退壓力，他對公司維持盈利有疑問。

他又提到，數據顯示內地消費市道回暖，2月通脹率1.3%，創逾3年新高，「內卷」壓力緩和，相信車廠4月減價壓力不大。



編輯：宋家樑
summary_zh: 內地3月新能源汽車銷量整體符合預期，大型車企增長放緩，市場「內卷」壓力趨緩，料4月減價壓力不大。

summary_zh: 滬股半日下跌0.93%，上證指數再次失守3900點，煤炭及電力股受壓。

headline: 內地3月服務業活動擴張步伐減慢　分析料短期維持擴張
excerpt:
標普全球編製的數據顯示，內地3月經季節調整服務業採購經理指數(PMI)跌至52.1，創3個月新低，反映服務業活動擴張速度減慢；指數在2月觸及56.7，創近3年新高。

調查指，服務業擴張速度顯著放緩，但整體運行仍保持穩健。新業務受到國內需求支撐而繼續增長，但增速減慢，新出口業務則回落至收縮區間。

就業水平再度收縮，價格則出現積極變化，投入成本壓力溫和；而為應對市場競爭，服務供應商上月普遍降低收費價格。

調查又指，企業對未來12個月業務活動預期仍保持樂觀，內需基礎仍穩固，但要留意外需波動與就業市場持續收縮情況，預計服務業PMI短期仍維持擴張區間。

另外，3月綜合PMI跌至51.5，創3個月低位，低於2月的55.4。



編輯：方嘉莉
summary_zh: 內地3月服務業PMI跌至52.1創3個月新低，服務業擴張步伐明顯減慢，但分析預計短期仍維持擴張。

headline: 李家超喜見在校課後託管服務為學生家長帶來裨益　將研究擴展計劃
excerpt:
行政長官李家超表示，政府推出「在校課後託管服務計劃」，為學生及家長在經濟、學業或家庭上帶來莫大裨益，對此深感欣慰，喜見計劃成效理想。他說會與團隊研究將計劃進一步擴展，以期充分利用資源，讓更多家庭受惠。

李家超趁復活節聯同教育局局長蔡若蓮、勞工及福利局局長孫玉菡到訪九龍城區一間小學，與學生一起迎接復活節假期來臨，他在社交平台上載相關影片。

他說到訪的學校夥拍非政府機構，正推行「在校課後託管服務計劃」，參與計劃的學生放學後，在導師指導下完成功課及溫習，亦會進行遊戲及課外活動。他與數名家長及其子女交流，多名家長表示，原本因需照顧孩子只能從事兼職，子女參與計劃後，他們可放心做全職，既紓緩經濟壓力，亦減輕管教困難。學生就表示，參加計劃後認識許多新朋友，在學業及社交層面均有正面發展。

政府在2023/24學年起推行有關計劃，由學校提供場地、關愛基金提供資金，委聘非政府機構負責營辦，讓有需要的小學生在課後留校接受託管及學習支援，方便家長外出工作。

計劃首年招募7個地區共59間小學參與，至2024/25學年擴展至全港共126間學校參與，服務名額倍增至近6000個。去年《施政報告》提出進一步優化
summary_zh: 李家超視察在校課後託管服務計劃，認為成效理想，為學生和家長帶來經濟及學業上的裨益，將研究進一步擴展計劃。

headline: 九巴指車費回贈機故障屬個別拍卡機問題已處理　無乘客多付車費
excerpt:
「兩蚊兩折」計劃昨日起實施，有報道指，九巴車費回贈機懷疑故障。九巴回覆查詢時表示，向負責更新系統的承辦商跟進了解，發現屬個別拍卡機問題，目前已經處理。

九巴重申，根據資料顯示，事件中沒有乘客因此多付車資，亦不會令政府有額外補貼金額。

九巴表示，經檢查後，確認現時系統及拍卡機運作正常。



編輯：潘潔平
summary_zh: 九巴澄清「兩蚊兩折」計劃推行期間車費回贈機故障屬個別拍卡機問題，已妥善處理，無乘客多付車費。

headline: 羅淑佩稱世界動盪凸顯香港安全便利　冀吸引旅客訪港帶來人氣財氣
excerpt:
本港首3個月訪港旅客有1431萬人次，按年上升17%，預計今年全年旅客將達5380萬人次，按年增加約8%。文化體育及旅遊局局長羅淑佩表示，香港國際七人欖球賽將於本月舉行，對4月旅客訪港的情況感樂觀。她又說，世界環境比較動盪、中東有戰爭，但亦凸顯香港很安全、好玩及便利。藝術品交易投資方面，香港也是好選擇。她希望人氣來、財氣都來，期望旅客在港留久一點或者消費多一點。

羅淑佩在本台節目《星期六問責》中表示，預計今年五一黃金周將有100萬旅客訪港，預計約有800個旅行團，她強調會做好秩序及安排到位，她會主持會議了解準備情況。

她又指出，酒店預計平均入住率達九成以上，而今年連同黃金周最後一天的入住率預計較以往多，料達七至八成。

另外，當局亦與巴塞爾藝術展達成協議，未來5年香港是亞洲區內唯一展會。羅淑佩認為，可以計劃得長遠一點，想加入香港特色，例如是文藝表演、山徑或海島旅遊、推介米芝蓮餐廳，以吸引旅客留港更長時間；並開拓更多廣東省以外的內地城市自由行旅客。



編輯：潘潔平
summary_zh: 旅遊局局長羅淑佩指世界動盪凸顯香港安全便利的優勢，預計今年訪港旅客達5380萬人次，冀透過七人欖球賽、五一黃金周等活動吸引旅客帶來人氣及消費。

headline: 蘇州創新中心助企業較低成本訓練機械人　港資本市場強利企業發展
excerpt:
「具身智能」是「十五五」規劃提出的重點未來產業之一，製造業大省江蘇，近年積極推動產業改革升級。蘇州市大力支持人工智能產業，去年7月市政府設立「具身智能機器人綜合創新中心」，提供應用場景讓進駐的企業以較低成本，進行機械人訓練和數據採集。

創新中心面積約5000平方米，已甄選15間當地機械人初創及科企進駐，包括研發機械狗、機械熊貓，以及各類人形機械人等企業。創新中心招商負責人眭瑾慧說，進駐的企業有半年免租期，若表現符合特定指標再可延期18個月。中心除提供訓練機械人的場地，亦會協助企業對接潛在客戶，包括舉辦機械人大賽、路演等。

當地另一個科企搖籃「蘇州國際科技園」，已經啟用20多年，至今培育超過5000間企業。科技園財務總監兼新聞發言人顏永萍說，蘇州的製造業基礎雄厚、種類齊全，人工智能可以賦能在不同類別的產業上，將科技應用到生活層面。

「十五五」規劃提出，支持香港建設國際創新科技中心，顏永萍說，香港是科技和人才高地，相信蘇港兩地未來會加強技術互通和人才交流。香港擁有全球最好資本市場，有利創科企業進一步「做大、做強」。



編輯：黃佩珊
summary_zh: 蘇州創新中心為機械人企業提供低成本訓練場景和業務對接，港資本市場優勢有助創科企業發展壯大。

headline: 機場一號客運大樓設「感知閣」讓自閉症人士候機時使用
excerpt:
機場一號客運大樓由本月起設立「感知閣」，讓患有自閉症、過度活躍症等人士，等候上機時使用。

「感知閣」位於一號客運大樓禁區L6離港層10號登機閘口附近，面積約300平方呎，同一時間能容納12人，清晨5時至午夜12時開放，費用全免、毋須預約。房間的牆身和地下都鋪有軟墊，使用者可以在房間內安全地爬行、翻滾、跳躍，房內燈光亦可調節光暗，設施包括兒童遊戲板、觸感牆、模擬機艙空間等。

機管局客運大樓及旅客體驗總經理歐陽顯宏表示，患有隱性殘障或精神障礙的人士，面對人多的環境或安檢過關時，可能會比較緊張，機管局一直重視關愛共融，希望「感知閣」能為他們提供安心、舒緩的候機環境。



編輯：譚佩貞
summary_zh: 香港機場一號客運大樓本月起設立「感知閣」，為自閉症及過度活躍症等人士提供免費、無須預約的舒緩候機環境。

headline: 政府高度關注九巴車費回贈機疑故障　稱已責成調查確保運作正常
excerpt:
「兩蚊兩折」計劃昨日起實施，有報道指，九巴車費回贈機懷疑故障。政府發言人表示，政府高度關注事件，運輸署已責成九巴立即展開調查，確保所有車費回贈機運作正常，防止同類事件再次發生，並盡快就事件提交詳細報告。

發言人說，車費回贈機出現故障期間，除合資格受惠人士外，其他巴士乘客亦可能受到影響。就合資格的「二元優惠計劃」受惠人士，以及其他巴士乘客得到的額外回贈，將由九巴自行承擔。九巴已經承諾是次事件不會令政府、「二元優惠計劃」受惠人及其他巴士乘客承擔任何損失。

政府強調，九巴作為主要公共交通營辦商，必須盡快改正相關系統，確保車費回贈機運作正常。



編輯：鄭皓璟
summary_zh: 「兩蚊兩折」計劃實施首日，九巴車費回贈機懷疑故障，政府已責成九巴立即調查並確保運作正常，故障期間的額外回贈由九巴自行承擔。

headline: 元朗6個月大女嬰昏迷送院後死亡　38歲印傭被捕
excerpt:
元朗一名6個月大女嬰昏迷送院後，證實死亡。38歲印傭涉嫌「對所看管兒童或少年人虐待或忽略」被捕，正被扣查。

事發在元朗錦繡花園大道一間獨立屋，警方早上11時許接獲女嬰家人報案，指女嬰在屋內暈倒。警員到場發現，女嬰倒卧床上，昏迷被送往博愛醫院治理，再轉往屯門醫院，最終證實死亡，死因有待驗屍後確定。

案件交由元朗警區重案組跟進。



編輯：李俊傑
summary_zh: 元朗一名6個月大女嬰昏迷送院後死亡，38歲印傭涉嫌虐待或忽略兒童被捕。

headline: 截至晚上9時　本港今日逾110萬人次出入境
excerpt:
復活節及清明節5日長假期首日，截至晚上9時，逾110萬人次出入境。出境人次超過77萬，當中港人佔逾68萬人次；入境人次逾32萬。

最多人經羅湖管制站出境，其次為落馬洲支線及深圳灣口岸。



編輯：李俊傑
summary_zh: 復活節及清明節長假期首日，本港截至晚上9時錄得逾110萬人次出入境，其中出境人次超過77萬。

headline: 國家安全教育參訪團返港　張國鈞勉勵學生裝備自己貢獻國家及香港
excerpt:
由特區政府主辦的第三屆國家安全教育參訪團，下午結束行程返港。參訪團分別到訪北京及南京，期間獲中央港澳工作辦公室、國務院港澳事務辦公室副主任農融接見。

參訪團成員包括來自30間香港中小學的過百名校長、老師及學生。律政司副司長張國鈞、特區維護國家安全委員會秘書長區志光亦有參與行程。張國鈞勉勵學生親身體會國家的歷史文化、科技發展，了解最新國情，裝備自己，將來為國家與香港作出貢獻。

區志光期望學生透過實地學習交流，對國家發展感到驕傲，對身為中國人感到自豪，對維護國家安全更有信心和決心。

參訪團包括獲邀登上天安門觀禮台，觀看有軍樂團現場演奏的升國旗儀式，以及參訪中國共產黨歷史展覽館等，亦有與內地學校的師生互動交流。



編輯：李俊傑
summary_zh: 特區政府第三屆國家安全教育參訪團圓滿結束，逾百名香港師生訪問北京、南京後返港，律政司副司長張國鈞勉勵學生裝備自己為國家及香港作貢獻。

headline: 保安局：早前緬甸被禁錮獲救港人　今日由泰國返港
excerpt:
保安局表示，早前在緬甸被禁錮從事非法工作、上星期獲救的港人，在專責小組人員陪同下，今日傍晚與家人由泰國返港。警方會繼續跟進。



編輯：李俊傑
summary_zh: 早前在緬甸被禁錮的港人於上周獲救，今日在專責小組陪同下由泰國返港與家人團聚。

headline: 【重溫】2026年4月3日新聞天地
excerpt: 詳盡報道本地時事、大中華消息、國際局勢等新聞，緊貼最新熱話。
summary_zh: 新聞天地重溫報道2026年4月3日的本地時事、大中華消息及國際局勢等最新熱話。

headline: 海關偵破兩宗毒品案　檢6.5公斤懷疑毒品拘兩人
excerpt:
海關過去兩日分別在機場及油麻地偵破毒品案，共檢獲約6.5公斤懷疑毒品，估計市值共約340萬元，拘捕兩名男子。兩人各被控以一項販運危險藥物罪，明日在觀塘裁判法院提堂。

海關表示，前日在機場截查一名由泰國曼谷抵港的43歲男子，在他的行李中，發現有食物包裝藏有約3.1公斤懷疑氯胺酮。

另一宗案件，海關在昨日的油麻地反毒品行動中，發現一名41歲外籍男子形跡可疑，其後到他租住的酒店房間搜查，檢獲約1.7公斤懷疑可卡因及約1.7公斤懷疑冰毒等。

海關呼籲市民，不要接受任何人聘請或委託運送受管制物品進出香港，亦應避免將個人資料交予他人作收取包裹用途，重申販運危險藥物屬極度嚴重罪行，一經定罪最高可被判罰款500萬元及終身監禁。



編輯：李俊傑
summary_zh: 香港海關過去兩日在機場及油麻地偵破兩宗毒品案，檢獲約6.5公斤懷疑毒品，市值約340萬元，拘捕兩名男子。

headline: 陳國基向夏寶龍匯報　發展北都大學城積極對接「十五五」
excerpt:
中央港澳辦、國務院港澳辦主任夏寶龍，周四在北京會見由政務司司長陳國基率領的「北部都會區發展委員會」轄下「大學城籌劃及建設組」代表團。陳國基向夏寶龍匯報近日在內地，考察高等教育建設。

陳國基說，會繼續推動北都大學城發展，積極對接國家《十五五規劃綱要》，為教育強國建設貢獻香港力量，助力香港更好融入和服務國家發展大局。



編輯：梁家奇
summary_zh: 政務司司長陳國基向中央港澳辦主任夏寶龍匯報北部都會區大學城發展進展，承諾積極對接國家「十五五」規劃並為教育強國建設貢獻香港力量。

headline: 孫玉菡:「兩蚊兩折」系統更新調整順利　有關安排將長期運行
excerpt:
長者及合資格殘疾人士公共交通票價優惠計劃，今日起調整為「兩蚊兩折」。有長者表示，支持調整計劃，亦有人表示會減少遠行。

勞工及福利局局長孫玉菡表示，「兩蚊兩折」系統更新調整順利，相信大多數長者都理解並清楚新的收費模式，「長車短搭」情況可得到明顯的改善。他又指隨著人口老化，未來將有更多人合資格使用「兩蚊兩折」，有關安排將長期運行。



編輯：梁家奇
summary_zh: 長者及合資格殘疾人士公共交通票價優惠計劃調整為「兩蚊兩折」，勞工及福利局局長孫玉菡表示系統更新順利，有關安排將長期運行。

headline: 中國胸痛中心大會首次在港舉行
excerpt:
第十五屆中國胸痛中心大會上午在灣仔會展舉行開幕典禮。

醫務衞生局局長盧寵茂說，本港公立醫院的胸痛中心及中風中心獲國家認證，有助香港融合中外醫療優勢，發展國際醫療創新樞紐，更好融入和服務國家建設「健康中國」發展大局，助力國家醫療衞生標準走出境外、走向國際。



編輯：梁家奇
summary_zh: 第十五屆中國胸痛中心大會首次在香港舉行，香港公立醫院的胸痛中心和中風中心獲國家認證，有助發展國際醫療創新樞紐。

headline: 飛機燃油附加費急升　大批市民乘高鐵外遊
excerpt:
復活節及清明長假期展開，大批市民經各口岸離境外遊。高鐵西九龍站一早人山人海，有市民參加旅行團，乘搭高鐵前往廣西再到越南旅遊，指近期燃油附加費急升，加上列車較為方便，因此選擇鐵路遊。

旅遊業界估計，復活節及清明長假的高鐵團較去年增加約3成，很多團三月中已爆滿，原因之一是中東地緣政治緊張，導致燃油附加費上升，而高鐵票價未有因此上升，很多旅客會選擇參加內地旅行團。



編輯：梁家奇
summary_zh: 飛機燃油附加費急升導致旅客改乘高鐵，復活節及清明假期高鐵團人數較去年增加約三成。

headline: 截至下午4時　本港共有逾61萬人次出境
excerpt:
一連5日的復活節及清明節長假期今日展開，截至下午4時，逾79萬人次出入境。出境佔超過61萬人次，當中港人佔近57萬人次；入境人次逾17萬。

最多人經羅湖管制站出境，其次為落馬洲支線及深圳灣口岸。



編輯：李俊傑
summary_zh: 復活節及清明節長假期首日，截至下午4時本港逾61萬人次出境，經羅湖管制站出境人數最多。

headline: 李強向蒙古新任總理致賀電　冀推動全面戰略伙伴關係不斷向前發展
excerpt:
國務院總理李強向蒙古新任總理烏其爾勒致賀電。

李強表示，近年來，在國家主席習近平及蒙古總統呼日勒蘇赫的戰略引領下，中蒙關係保持健康穩定發展，為兩國人民帶來實實在在的福祉，亦為地區和平穩定作出重要貢獻。中國政府高度重視中蒙關係，願同蒙方一起，以構建中蒙命運共同體為引領，夯實雙方政治互信，加強發展戰略對接，擴大各領域交流合作，推動兩國全面戰略伙伴關係不斷向前發展。



編輯：鄭皓璟
summary_zh: 中國總理李強向蒙古新任總理烏其爾勒致賀電，表示將以構建命運共同體為引領，推動中蒙全面戰略伙伴關係發展。

headline: 何立峰晤商鵬飛　同意下半年舉行經濟財金戰略對話
excerpt:
在北京，國務院副總理、中加經濟財金戰略對話中方牽頭人何立峰下午會見加拿大財政部部長、對話加方聯合牽頭人商鵬飛。

何立峰表示，雙方應共同落實好兩國領導人重要共識，深化經貿、金融等領域合作，推動中加經濟關係穩定健康發展。新華社報道，商鵬飛說加方高度重視對華關係，願意與中方共同推動經濟財金合作，取得更多務實成果。
　　
雙方同意今年下半年舉行經濟財金戰略對話。何立峰與商鵬飛亦共同會見中加金融工作組與金融機構圓桌會代表，歡迎雙方金融機構在對方市場拓展業務。



編輯：羅宇光
summary_zh: 中國副總理何立峰與加拿大財政部部長商鵬飛會晤，雙方同意下半年舉行經濟財金戰略對話，深化兩國經貿金融合作。

headline: 王毅促安理會勿給未經授權軍事行動披合法外衣
excerpt:
中共中央政治局委員、外長王毅，分別應約與沙特阿拉伯、德國及歐盟方面的外交主要官員通電話，討論中東局勢。王毅指出，聯合國安理會應著眼於緩局降溫，不應給未經授權的軍事行動，披上合法外衣，以免衝突升級。

另外，中國常駐聯合國代表傅聰表示，安理會如果授權會員國使用武力，無異於將非法濫用武力的行徑合法化。安理會必須謹慎行事，為推動局勢降溫、恢復對話談判發揮積極作用。



編輯：梁家奇
summary_zh: 中國外長王毅促聯合國安理會應緩解中東局勢，不應為未經授權的軍事行動提供合法性，以防衝突升級。

headline: 新華社：馬興瑞涉嫌嚴重違紀違法受查
excerpt:
新華社報道，中央政治局委員、中央農村工作領導小組副組長馬興瑞涉嫌嚴重違紀違法，正接受中央紀委國家監委紀律審查和監察調查。



編輯：李俊傑
summary_zh: 中央政治局委員、中央農村工作領導小組副組長馬興瑞涉嫌嚴重違紀違法，目前正接受中央紀委國家監委的紀律審查和監察調查。
keywords_zh: 中央農村工作領導小組

headline: 敏昂萊當選緬甸總統　中方祝賀
excerpt:
緬甸聯邦議會總統選舉團投票選舉總統，敏昂萊高票當選總統。在共584票當中，敏昂萊獲得429票，對手紐梭獲得126票，南尼尼埃獲得29票。根據結果，紐梭與南尼尼埃擔任副總統。

敏昂萊現年69歲，曾擔任緬甸國防軍總司令，現任代總統。

中方祝賀敏昂萊當選緬甸總統。外交部發言人毛寧在例行記者會上表示，中緬是傳統友好鄰邦及命運共同體，中國對緬甸友好政策面向全體緬甸人民，中方支持緬甸新政府維護國家和平穩定，實現發展繁榮，願意與緬方共同努力，落實好四大全球倡議，積極推進高質量共建「一帶一路」合作，推動中緬命運共同體建設取得更多務實成果，更好造福兩國人民。



編輯：羅宇光
summary_zh: 緬甸聯邦議會總統選舉團投票選出敏昂萊為新總統，中國外交部隨即表示祝賀並重申深化中緬戰略伙伴關係。

headline: 陳國基明天往陝西省訪問　深化陝港兩地合作
excerpt:
政務司司長陳國基明日上午啓程前往陝西省訪問，與當地領導會面交流，深化陝港兩地合作，並出席清明公祭軒轅黃帝典禮。

陳國基將於後日下午返港。在他離港期間，政務司副司長卓永興將署理政務司司長職務。



編輯：李俊傑
summary_zh: 政務司司長陳國基明日前往陝西省訪問，與當地領導會面深化陝港合作，並出席清明公祭軒轅黃帝典禮。

headline: 內地要求提升外置充電器安全防護能力　明年4月起實施
excerpt:
工業和信息化部組織發布《移動電源安全技術規範》，要求提升外置充電器在高溫、過度充電、擠壓等場景下的安全防護能力，並新增循環老化方面的檢測，降低充電器長期使用後的內部短路風險，明年4月1日起實施。

新華社報道，技術規範設置了12個月過渡期，是考慮到為企業研發新產品、設計和調整生產線預留時間。過渡期結束後，企業必須按照技術規範生產製造和銷售產品。

新標準實施後，消費者已購買、並已取得3C認證的合規外置充電產品，仍然可以繼續使用。




編輯：許敬軒
summary_zh: 內地工信部發布新的移動電源安全技術規範，要求提升外置充電器在極端條件下的安全防護能力，明年4月起實施。

headline: 江蘇生物醫藥産業鏈完整而香港醫學水平高　産業園指兩地可增合作
excerpt:
「十五五」規劃提出加速發展壯大「生物醫藥」等新興産業，有在江蘇的生物醫藥產業園負責人說，江蘇有完整産業鏈，香港醫學水平高，兩地可在臨床數據等方面加強合作。
 
有主要研製抗愛滋病藥物的江蘇一型藥廠表示，中國創新藥物的水平已經由過去「跟跑」，進入「併跑」階段，而研發新藥需要巨額資金，未來會考慮到香港上市融資。
 

 

編輯：黃佩珊
summary_zh: 江蘇生物醫藥產業鏈完整且香港醫學水平高，兩地產業園與藥廠冀加強合作並探索融資機遇。

headline: 長假期展開大批市民坐高鐵回內地　有內地客「錯峰出行」提前來港
excerpt:
今日是復活節及清明5日長假期首日，大批市民經高鐵西九龍站出境到內地，出境大堂多個櫃位一度出現人龍。

有參加內地團的市民表示，計劃坐高鐵先到重慶，再上郵輪遊覽長江三峽，最後從武漢坐高鐵回港，期望欣賞內地的偉大工程，以及感受風土人情；有市民參加重慶團，除了欣賞櫻花，亦會到訪近年國劇的取景地。

有市民跟團到廣西遊玩，希望觀賞桂林風景，並品嘗當地的米粉，又會購買辣椒醬和馬蹄；亦有市民跟團坐高鐵到廣西南寧，再經口岸出境到越南河內，認為假期太多人到內地玩，加上燃油附加費令飛機票價上升，因此選擇經高鐵到越南旅行。

另外，一連3日內地清明節假期明日開始，有內地自由行旅客「錯峰出行」提前來港。有北京旅客說，第一次來香港，希望到尖沙咀一帶感受本港的繁華；有南京旅客希望到訪山頂和金紫荊廣場，人均消費沒有限制。



編輯：譚佩貞
summary_zh: 長假期首日大批港人經高鐵前往內地旅遊，同時內地旅客亦提前「錯峰出行」來港。

headline: 復活清明長假期展開　大批市民坐高鐵往內地旅遊
excerpt:
復活節及清明5日長假期開始，大批市民經高鐵西九龍站前往內地。

香港外遊旅行商協會主席陳志華說，今次假期市民報團需求大，估計按年增幅約3成，其中一個原因是中東地緣政治情況，航班燃油附加費上升，但高鐵票價不受影響，很多客人選擇高鐵內地團。

陳志華表示，農曆新年後開放報名，至上月中幾乎爆滿，熱門地方包括重慶、廣西、湖北和湖南，廣州和潮汕等短線團亦受歡迎。他又透露，很難搶購高鐵車票，因此可在深圳北、廣州南甚至外省地方中轉，不一定限於購買從香港直達內地的班次。

另外，一連3日內地清明節假期明日開始，香港旅遊促進會總幹事崔定邦預料明日是入境「小高峰」，主要是大灣區的自由行旅客，或來自廣西和福建等短途客。

至於在機場，不少市民出發外遊。有市民與家人前往高雄 5日，表示燃油附加費增加令機票加價數百元，但不會因而減少消費。亦有市民前往日本旅遊，表示早在油價上升前，已購買機票。



編輯：譚佩貞
summary_zh: 復活節及清明5日長假期開始，大批市民經高鐵往內地旅遊，報團需求按年增約3成，主要因航班燃油費上升促使民眾改選高鐵。

headline: Global banks carve out roles as semiconductor wealth redraws Taiwan’s finance map
excerpt:
Taiwan’s dominance in semiconductors is no longer just reshaping global technology supply chains – it is also redrawing the island’s financial landscape, as international banks move to capture the wealth being created across the chip ecosystem.
From first-generation chip entrepreneurs setting up family offices to retail investors pouring money into exchange-traded funds (ETFs), the capital generated by Taiwan’s technology boom is spreading across multiple layers of the economy.
Global lenders...
full_text:
Taiwan’s dominance in semiconductors is no longer just reshaping global technology supply chains – it is also redrawing the island’s financial landscape, as international banks move to capture the wealth being created across the chip ecosystem.

From first-generation chip entrepreneurs setting up family offices to retail investors pouring money into exchange-traded funds (ETFs), the capital generated by Taiwan’s technology boom is spreading across multiple layers of the economy.

Global lenders are responding by sharpening their strategies, each targeting a different slice of that expanding wealth pool.

At the private banking end, BNP Paribas is positioning itself as a long-term partner to newly wealthy entrepreneurs navigating the transition from concentrated equity holdings to globally diversified portfolios.

“First-generation technology and semiconductor-linked entrepreneurs are becoming a larger component of new UHNW [ultra high net worth] formation in Taiwan, alongside long-established wealth from trading, traditional manufacturing, and real estate,” said Arnaud Tellier, Asia-Pacific CEO at BNP Paribas Wealth Management.
summary_zh: 台灣半導體產業主導地位帶動財富增長，國際銀行紛紛調整策略以掌握晶片生態系統所創造的龐大商機，重塑台灣金融版圖。

headline: 孫玉菡稱「兩蚊兩折」運作暢順　回贈機故障涉及車費由九巴承擔
excerpt:
勞工及福利局局長孫玉菡表示，「二元優惠」乘車計劃昨日起調整為「兩蚊兩折」，運作暢順，又指昨日落區時大多數長者都了解新安排，相信宣傳到位。

對於有九巴車費回贈機昨日懷疑故障，有長者拍卡時全數回贈車費，孫玉菡出席一個電視節目時表示，九巴回贈過多的費用，全部由九巴承擔，強調長者和政府沒有任何損失。他指九巴今早已調整系統，確認拍卡機運作正常，又提到運輸署已要求九巴調查，並提交報告。

至於渡輪加價令居住在離島的長者乘船出行的成本上升，孫玉菡承認居住偏遠地區的長者在新計劃下要負擔更多，但希望市民理解政府仍承擔八成車資，又指所節省的開支會用於長者身上。

他相信「兩蚊兩折」不會減低長者的出行意欲，又提到政府有很多不同政策鼓勵長者出行，包括「賞你惠食」計劃，讓長者以優惠價錢享用指定午市或晚市餐飲等。



編輯：潘潔平
summary_zh: 孫玉菡表示「兩蚊兩折」運作暢順，惟九巴回贈機故障導致過多退款，相關損失由九巴承擔。

headline: 羅淑佩：中東局勢未影響旅客數字　料五一約100萬旅客訪港
excerpt:
本港首3個月訪港旅客有1431萬人次，按年上升17%。文化體育及旅遊局局長羅淑佩表示，中東局勢凸顯香港很安全、好玩及便利，又說對訪港旅客數字未有影響。

她對4月旅客訪港的情況感樂觀，預計五一黃金周會有約100萬旅客訪港。
summary_zh: 文化體育及旅遊局局長羅淑佩表示中東局勢未影響香港旅客數字，預計五一黃金周將有約100萬旅客訪港。

headline: 天文台：大埔區雨勢特別大　可能出現嚴重水浸
excerpt:
黃色暴雨警告信號生效。

天文台發出局部地區大雨提示，指大埔區的雨勢特別大，已錄得或預料會有每小時雨量超過70毫米的大雨，可能出現嚴重水浸，可能受影響的市民應採取適當預防措施，防止水浸可能引致的損失。



編輯：許敬軒
summary_zh: 天文台發出局部地區大雨提示，指大埔區雨勢特別大，每小時雨量超過70毫米，可能出現嚴重水浸。

headline: 受雷電影響　昂坪360纜車暫停登車
excerpt:
昂坪360宣布，由於受雷電影響，已於上午10時54分起，暫停讓乘客登車。

昂坪360將於天氣好轉後，盡快恢復登車安排。



編輯：黃佩珊
summary_zh: 昂坪360纜車因受雷電影響，已暫停登車服務，待天氣好轉後恢復營運。

headline: 黃色暴雨警告信號生效
excerpt:
天文台在早上十一時發出黃色暴雨警告信號。

天文台表示香港廣泛地區已錄得或預料會有每小時雨量超過30毫米的大雨，且雨勢可能持續。

一些低窪地帶及排水欠佳的地區會出現水淹。可能受大雨及水浸影響之市民應採取適當的預防措施，以防止可能引致的損失。

大雨可能引致山洪暴發，市民應遠離河道。可能受河道氾濫影響之市民應採取適當的預防措施，以避免損失。



編輯：方潤南
summary_zh: 天文台於早上十一時發出黃色暴雨警告信號，香港廣泛地區預料會有時雨量超過30毫米的大雨，低窪地區恐出現水淹及山洪。

headline: 天文台：未來一兩小時廣泛地區可能受大雨影響　預料強陣風吹襲
excerpt:
天文台表示，未來一兩小時廣泛地區可能受大雨影響，市民應提高警覺。

天文台同時預料強陣風吹襲香港，如身處室外，請盡快到安全地方躲避。



編輯：許敬軒
summary_zh: 天文台警告未來一兩小時廣泛地區將受大雨影響，同時預料強陣風吹襲香港，促市民提高警覺並尋求安全地方躲避。

headline: 羅淑佩：中東局勢未有影響訪港旅客數字
excerpt:
文化體育及旅遊局局長羅淑佩說，中東局勢下，歐洲來港轉機航班會受影響，但直航增多，目前旅客數字未有受影響。同時她提到，有歐美甚至中東卡塔爾收藏家來港參與藝術展覽；形容高端旅客消費意欲好，會體驗「世界第一」的酒店、酒吧等。

羅淑佩在本台節目《星期六問責》說，香港目前藝術品倉儲水準不一致，而貴重藝術品對倉儲要求很高，包括在光線 、溫度及濕度等都要有好的處理。她說，機管局正於機場範圍發展藝術與珍品倉儲設施，相信有助吸引物主多選擇香港作為中轉站，甚至順道訪港。而當局與巴塞爾藝術展商談時，對方亦表示，有這類倉儲設施，大家會更想將香港視為投資藝術品的重鎮。

另外，啟德體育園開幕超過1年，羅淑佩說，會總結經驗，看看是否需要微調早前訂下的關鍵績效指標（KPI），以符合實際需要。至於香港馬拉松賽事日後舉辦的模式，羅淑佩說，希望田總盡快提交方案。她認為可思考舉行兩日的建議，但當中牽涉更多人力物力，要考慮多個因素，包括承辦能力及市民的接受程度。



編輯：潘潔平
summary_zh: 文化體育及旅遊局局長羅淑佩表示，中東局勢未對訪港旅客數字造成影響，高端旅客消費意欲良好。

headline: 內地清明節假期展開　有內地旅客指會在港逛街打卡
excerpt:
內地一連3日清明節假期展開，早上在高鐵西九龍站，大批內地旅客陸續抵港。

有深圳旅客指喜歡聽粵語歌，趁清明假期訪港，希望到訪銅鑼灣黃金廣場及時代廣場。

亦有湖南旅客第一次訪港，計劃留港3日，主要希望選購嬰兒用品，認為質量較有保障。她說，本來計劃到景點及街頭打卡，但天氣預測會下雨，可能要「雨中漫步」，又指過關人流比想像中多。

有北京旅客計劃到港澳3日遊，明日到澳門觀看乒乓球世界盃賽事，其餘時間在香港逛街打卡，形容香港的街道很有氛圍，計劃在傍晚乘坐開篷觀光巴士。

有深圳旅客帶同兒子來港一日遊，打算先到西九故宮文化博物館，感受香港的文化歷史，再到旺角及星光大道等，亦會觀賞海景及體驗乘坐渡輪，又指考慮到香港的住宿成本較高，假期4人一晚酒店估計要花費2000至3000元，計劃今晚就返回深圳。

入境處預計，復活節及清明節假期期間約有644萬人次，經各口岸進出香港，入境處已加派人手及加開檢查櫃枱，疏導人流及車流。



編輯：潘潔平
summary_zh: 內地清明節假期展開，大批內地旅客經高鐵西九龍站抵港，計劃在港逛街購物、打卡遊覽，入境處預計假期期間約644萬人次經各口岸進出香港。

headline: 醫管局有病人資料外洩已報警　私隱專員公署：逾5萬6千人受影響
excerpt:
醫管局發生病人資料外洩事件，私隱專員公署表示，已接獲通報，超過56000人受影響。涉事的個人資料包括姓名、身份證號碼、性別、出生日期、醫院編號、預約日期，以及健康資訊。

公署表示，根據既定機制就事件展開調查，提醒可能受影響人士提高警惕，包括收到不明來歷或可疑的來電、短訊或電郵時要提高警覺，切勿隨意打開附件、連結或披露個人資料等。

醫管局表示，恆常監察系統於昨日凌晨，發現一宗懷疑未經授權將病人資料取走，並於第三方平台洩漏的個案，強調高度重視事件，並已報警。局方又指，已檢視內部網絡系統，確認系統運作安全正常。醫管局會全面配合警方調查及行動，並聯絡受影響病人。



編輯：潘潔平
summary_zh: 醫管局發生病人資料外洩事件，超過56000人受影響，涉及姓名、身份證號碼等個人資料，醫管局已報警並接受私隱專員公署調查。

headline: Can world markets ride out the rest of Trump’s reign?
excerpt:
A century on, T.S. Eliot’s poem The Hollow Men strikes a disturbingly ominous note: This is the way the world ends / Not with a bang but a whimper.
With the way things are going at present, we could be about to find out which of these endings it will be. The hope is that the Iran-centred conflagration in the Middle East will not turn into a nuclear apocalypse and that the “whimper” will be merely a cry from the depths of global economic recession.
But either scenario is possible while the Trump.
full_text:
A century on, T.S. Eliot’s poem The Hollow Men strikes a disturbingly ominous note: This is the way the world ends / Not with a bang but a whimper.

But either scenario is possible while the Trump administration remains in office and as hostility and rearmament gather pace among powers great and small. It’s worth remembering that the second world war came on the heels of the Great Depression in the 1930s.

Economic misery provokes an increase in trade protectionism and defence spending that is meant to provide employment, which in turn feeds into a nothing-to-lose mentality and military adventurism, as history has shown.

This time, the threat is of a greater magnitude. As Chatham House put it in a recent headline, “The Iran war risks triggering a new wave of nuclear proliferation”. It seems to be widely assumed that the latest Gulf war will end within months or even weeks from now. But setting aside the direct economic impact, the lasting effects on consumer, business and investor confidence are being overlooked.

We are talking about a situation of shock and trauma, not simply one of uncertainty and concern. Why would anyone wish to invest in anything for the longer term if they fear there might not be a longer term, or that the future will be even worse than the present?
summary_zh: 文章分析川普政府任期內全球市場面臨的風險，擔憂中東伊朗局勢可能升級為核危機，或引發全球經濟衰退。

headline: Asian travelers seek respite in other options as Middle East travel plans stay grounded
excerpt: Ticket prices across airlines in Asia increase in the midst of Iran War tensions, Asian travelers look elsewhere to relax
full_text:
AFP | Getty Images

Amid the ongoing Iran war, the roar of the Middle East's commercial tourism has been replaced by the steady hum of repatriation flights, leaving vacationers to navigate the landscape of rising airfares and safety concerns. It's yet another airspace closure that airlines have had to deal with since the 2022 Russian invasion of Ukraine.

It's a stark contrast to a prediction from the United Arab Emirates' Ministry of Economy and Tourism that the country would amass a market volume of almost $950 billion by 2026. Dubai, in particular, finds its position as the crown jewel of Middle East's tourism faltering as its airports have been forced to shut temporarily during the conflict.

Canceled flights to and from the Middle East region have exceeded 46,000 since the U.S.-Israel attacks on Feb. 28, aviation data firm Cirium told CNBC previously. And at the Aviation Festival in Singapore in March, India's SpiceJet said the Middle East conflict has significantly affected its operations due to heavy traffic between India and the region.

But it's not just airlines that have been cancelling flights. Travelers from Asia told CNBC they have been canceling their travel plans to the Middle East and considering holidays within their own region instead.

Canceled travel plans

Vietnam-based Michelle Bui, Regional Associate Manager at Ellerton & Co. Public Relations, told CNBC she initially intended to tour the Middle East in May to visit friends in the region and spend time in its deserts.

Her plans were quickly cut short when she began looking for flight tickets, as prices were "just so high," that she couldn't justify the cost, she told CNBC in an interview — a surge in fuel prices caused by the fallout from the Iran war has seen airfares rise. Bui found that flight tickets, including layovers, from Vietnam to the Middle East, had reached about $1,500 to $2,000 in March.

Many travelers cited non-refundable fare change fees as a top cancellation trigger, Jay Ellenby, president of Safe Harbors travel group, said in an email. There was a noticeable 20-30% uptick in cancellations for Middle East routes from the travel agency's Asian clients, with many quoting $450 non-refundable fare change fees on international trips being a top cancellation trigger.

Instead, these travelers were pivoting to Southeast Asian hubs like Singapore or intra-Asian routes, Ellenby added.

Booking platforms have been collating user data to create more effective suggestions for travelers stuck in transit or in ticket planning limbo.

Instead of needing to have multiple booking tabs open, travel websites have been looking to help shoppers find quick solutions, according to Maurizio Garavello, senior vice president at data analytics company Qlik.

"Are you checking three times because you're checking a different price, if there is a promo, or [are you] checking three times because you cannot find something that makes you comfortable [to travel]?" By identifying a consumer's issue, it's easier for a company to provide a solution and gain an extra booking dollar, he said.

Lost Horizon Images | Image Source | Getty Images

Business travelers

Business trips have been no different.

With some companies pausing travel to risky areas until further notice, voluntary flight cancellations on Europe to Asia routes more than doubled in the first week of March, according to data from travel agency Perk. It's a likely indication that companies are "weighing their options to ensure their employees are out of risk," said Perk's President, JC Taunay-Bucalo, in an email to CNBC.

Vincent Siow, general manager for Singapore and Brunei at Novo Nordisk , told CNBC his flight to Singapore from Copenhagen on Feb. 28 was canceled and he became temporarily stranded in Dubai.

Novo Nordisk's security team organized flights for Siow from Dubai to Istanbul via Doha and Riyadh, and then back to Singapore, a convoluted route by any estimation.

For business travelers like Siow, work travel is likely to continue. "We'll still have meetings," Siow said, "it's just that we need to plan properly, try to avoid flying in that zone."

For some businesses, traveling to closer locations and via other means, is proving the more attractive option.

There has been a good take up rate for passengers traveling from Singapore to Batam in Indonesia by ferry, according to Singapore Cruise Centre's CEO Jacqueline Tan. Some Singaporean businesses run offshore manufacturing operations in Batam, while others send staff to the island for meetings or corporate retreats, Tan said.

In spite of a fuel surcharge of 6 Singapore dollars ($4.66), Horizon Ferry, which operates vessels on the popular 60-minute trip between Singapore and Batam, has seen the number of customers in March "holding quite well," Tan added.

Traveling the region

Regional travel, particularly via ferry or cruise, offers "a very quick gratification for a very short get away. You don't really have to think about it...
summary_zh: 伊朗戰爭導致中東旅遊受阻，亞洲遊客轉向其他目的地，航空票價隨之上升。

headline: 醫管局病人資料外洩　涉逾5萬病人包括姓名及醫院檔案號碼
excerpt:
醫管局發生病人資料外洩事件，涉及56000多名來自九龍東醫院聯網的病人。

醫管局發表聲明，指恆常監察系統於昨日凌晨2時許發現一宗懷疑未經授權，將病人資料取走並於第三方平台洩漏的個案，外洩資料包含病人姓名、性別、身分證號碼、醫院檔案號碼和手術內容等。

醫管局在事發後已嚴正檢視內部網絡系統，確認系統運作安全正常，事件不涉及網絡攻擊等因素，並已即時暫停承辦商的系統維護工作。

醫管局隨即報警及通報個人資料私隱專員公署，並會全面配合警方調查及行動，並向受影響病人致歉，將採取一切可行措施，務求將對病人影響減至最低。

發言人說，醫管局會盡快透過「HA Go」應用程式、郵寄及電話方式，通知受影響病人。九龍東醫院聯網亦已設立熱線5215 7326，供病人就事件查詢，熱線運作時間為星期一至日，早上9時至下午6時；病人亦可於非熱線運作時間留言查詢，職員會盡快回覆，又呼籲受影響病人提高警覺，留意個人資料會否被用作其他用途，作好個人資料保護，例如更改密碼等，有需要時可向警方求助。
　　 
醫管局強調，非常重視網絡保安，會持續採取多項措施強化醫療系統，包括持續提升網絡安全保障、用戶安全意識、重要關鍵基礎設
summary_zh: 醫管局發生病人資料外洩事件，涉及九龍東醫院聯網56000多名病人的姓名、身分證號碼及醫院檔案號碼等資料被洩露至第三方平台。
keywords_zh: 個人資料私隱專員公署

headline: 醫管局病人資料外洩事件　網絡安全及科技罪案調查科接手調查
excerpt:
醫管局發生病人資料外洩事件，私隱專員公署表示，已接獲通報有超過56000人受影響。警方表示，案件昨日已交由網絡安全及科技罪案調查科跟進調查，暫時未有人被捕。

醫管局表示，恆常監察系統於昨日凌晨發現一宗懷疑未經授權，將病人資料取走並於第三方平台洩漏的個案，隨即報警，強調會全面配合警方調查及行動，並聯絡受影響病人。



編輯：潘潔平
summary_zh: 醫管局病人資料外洩事件，超過56000人受影響，警方網絡安全及科技罪案調查科已接手調查。
keywords_zh: 網絡安全及科技罪案調查科

headline: 陳美寶冀加快引進新型集體運輸規管框架　令本港交通更多元
excerpt:
行政長官會同行政會議日前批准「啟德智慧綠色集體運輸系統」的鐵路方案，運輸及物流局局長陳美寶表示，項目將會是香港首個投入服務的智慧綠色集體運輸系統，當局稍後會向立法會交通事務委員會介紹全新的法定規管框架，加快引進新型運輸系統項目在香港「落地」，軟硬件同步提速提效，帶動地區發展、便利市民出行。

陳美寶發表網誌，提到全新規管框架容許政府能向新型集體運輸系統的營運商批出專營權，及制定針對不同技術系統的監管要求，能有效地規管營運商在專營權期間的服務及表現，框架重點在於技術中立、通用且標準化，可適用於不同系統。完成項目招標程序後，政府可就項目採用的技術系統，針對性制定具體的監管要求，提速批出專營權，吸引世界各地不同系統供應商和營運商，令香港的交通體系更多元、更便利。

陳美寶說，首批透過新框架規管的項目，將包括正全速推動，分別位於啟德、東九龍，以及洪水橋／厦村的智慧綠色集體運輸系統，考慮到啟德發展區的走線方案相對簡單，有別於其他項目要先完成刊憲程序才進行招標，當局將啟德鐵路方案的刊憲和招標程序同步進行，提速約6個月，項目合約於去年10月展開招標，當局爭取今年內批出合約，期望系統於2031年投入服
summary_zh: 運輸及物logistics局局長陳美寶表示，政府批准啟德智慧綠色集體運輸系統鐵路方案，將推出新規管框架以加快引進新型運輸系統，令香港交通更多元便利。
keywords_zh: 智慧綠色集體運輸系統

headline: 本港將舉辦創科盛事　孫東冀通過活動顯香港優勢拓展商機與合作
excerpt:
創新科技及工業局表示，踏入四4月，多項創科盛事及活動即將在港舉行，包括「香港國際創科展」（InnoEX）、「國際創科營商周」展覽，每年平均吸引約150個國家和地區、累計超過24萬人次參與，逐漸成為區內重要的創科盛典。至於去年在本港舉辦的首屆世界互聯網大會亞太峰會，今年4月再度在港舉行，兩大活動勢將香港的創科氣氛再推上高峰。

創新科技及工業局局長孫東在網誌說，創新科技發展越顯重要，全球各地爭相舉辦以創科為焦點的展覽盛會，以展示最新創科成果和增進業界交流。特區政府於2023年開始舉辦InnoEX，今年踏入第四屆，將於4月13至16日在香港會展中心舉行，今年將有來自21個國家和地區及17個內地省市參與。

世界互聯網大會亞太峰會今次再次在港舉辦，孫東說，今年峰會以「數智賦能創新發展——攜手構建網絡空間命運共同體」為主題，於4月13至14日期間舉行，將邀請國際知名創科翹楚分享，亦首次設立部長級會議，匯聚海內外部長級官員，深入探討創科如何驅動經濟高質量增長等。期望通過峰會，可突破地域界限，推動全球數字創新與技術交流踏上新台階。

孫東又說，香港作為國家重要對外窗口，舉辦創科盛事不僅彰顯創科實力
summary_zh: 香港將於4月舉辦香港國際創科展及世界互聯網大會亞太峰會等創科盛事，以展示創科成果、拓展商機及推動全球創新合作。

headline: 截至早上10時　超過24萬人次出入境本港

summary_zh: 清明節假期首日，截至早上10時已有超過24萬人次出入境本港，其中入境超過8萬人次、出境超過16萬7千人次。

天文台在下午1時40分，取消黃色暴雨警告信號。

headline: Debris from aerial interception strikes Oracle building in Dubai, UAE says
excerpt: The damage to Oracle's building comes after Iran warned it would target U.S. tech companies operating in the Middle East.
full_text:
The office of U.S. tech giant Oracle in Dubai was damaged by falling debris, the city's media office said on Sunday, as Iran continued to fire projectiles at targets around the Middle East in retaliation against U.S. and Israeli strikes.

"Authorities confirm that they responded to a minor incident caused by debris from an aerial interception that fell on the facade of the Oracle building in Dubai Internet City," the Dubai Media Office said in a post on X. No one was injured in the incident, the media office said.

Oracle didn't immediately respond to a request for comment emailed by CNBC.

A CNBC journalist in Dubai reported hearing multiple interceptions overnight.

Iran's Revolutionary Guard has threatened attacks on a swath of U.S. tech companies with operations in the Middle East, including Nvidia, Apple, Microsoft and Google.

The Guard warned on Tuesday that 18 tech companies would be considered as "legitimate targets" in retaliation for U.S. and Israeli strikes on Iran.

"From now on, for every assassination, an American company will be destroyed," they said in an Guard-affiliated Telegram channel.

The list of companies also included Cisco, HP, Intel, IBM, Dell, Palantir, JPMorgan, Tesla, GE, Spire Solutions, Boeing and UAE-based artificial intelligence company G42.

James Henderson, CEO of risk management firm Healix, said the rise in threats against tech companies is not a flash in the pan, but is a sustained pattern.

"Tech assets are now treated as part of the conflict, not peripheral to it," Henderson told CNBC.

"It also signals that future crises may target data centers and cloud platforms as much as traditional strategic sites," he added.
summary_zh: 伊朗對美國及以色列進行報復，導致迪拜甲骨文大樓遭空中攔截碎片擊中受損；伊朗曾警告將針對中東地區的美國科技公司進行攻擊。

headline: 海關偵破入境旅客販毒案　檢獲4.4公斤懷疑海洛英
excerpt:
海關在機場偵破一宗入境旅客的販毒案件，檢獲約4.4公斤懷疑海洛英，估計市值約290萬元，並拘捕一名20歲男旅客。
　　　
海關說，該名旅客今日從馬來西亞檳城飛抵本港，海關人員清關時，在他的手提行李內發現懷疑海洛英，因此將他拘捕，並控以一項販運危險藥物罪，案件下周一在東區裁判法院提堂。
　　 


編輯：陳樂謙
summary_zh: 海關在機場截獲入境旅客行李中的4.4公斤懷疑海洛英，拘捕一名20歲男旅客並控以販運危險藥物罪。

headline: 愉翠苑車費回贈機一度故障　政府：九巴須向受影響乘客發還回贈
excerpt:
有報道指，九巴設於沙田愉翠苑的車費回贈機暫停使用。勞工及福利局表示，政府高度關注事件，回贈機暫停使用會影響所有乘客，包括「兩蚊兩折」受惠人士，政府已指示九巴必須迅速向受影響乘客發還分段收費回贈；九巴表示已立即跟進，而該回贈機已回復正常運作。

政府說，涉事回贈機故障期間，「二元優惠計劃」受惠人士未能取回車費回贈，會令政府在該計劃下的車費補貼增加，又強調政府不會向九巴發還因此而引致的額外車費補貼，並會與九巴密切跟進補貼的詳細安排，保障公帑。

政府又說，九巴作為公共交通營辦商，有責任確保系統運作正常，敦促九巴認真跟進，避免類似情況發生。



編輯：陳樂謙
summary_zh: 沙田愉翠苑九巴車費回贈機故障，政府指示九巴必須向受影響乘客發還回贈，並表示不會向九巴補償因此增加的車費補貼。

excerpt: 詳盡報道本地時事、大中華消息、國際局勢等新聞，緊貼最新熱話。
